blocks.h2: We have everything you need for an easy arrival and a smooth departure
paragraphs: We conveniently offer ATMs, baggage wrapping, lactation rooms and pods, pet and service animal relief areas and more. Use the interactive map opens in a new tab to find directions to your chosen amenity.
Each terminal has a unique set of offerings and services. Some may need scheduling or enrollment in advance, so plan accordingly. Explore our terminals for more information.

links.text: interactive map opens in a new tab
Explore our terminals for more information.

blocks.h2: Global Entry, TSA PreCheck and CLEAR enrollment
paragraphs: JFK offers enrollment services for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, and CLEAR. CLEAR helps you move through security lines faster, while TSA PreCheck provides a quicker security screening. Global Entry and Mobile Passport Control speed up customs when you return, and Global Entry also includes TSA PreCheck. TSA Touchless is also available for a faster, contact-free experience.
Pre-enroll online before heading to the enrollment center office in Terminal 4 to complete your enrollment.

paragraphs: ARK Pet Oasis provides pet care, animal shipping, and veterinary services for animals traveling as cargo. You can contact them at +1 (212) 973-8275 or by email.
